why_it_matters: PHQ-2 documents the initial positive depression screen that justified the full PHQ-9, but the PHQ-9=17 already captures the actionable finding, making this largely redundant.
Respiratory rate completes the vital sign set for a general exam, though the normal value here has no impact on management.
Medication reconciliation is a standard quality element of a general/annual exam, but with no medications the clinical stakes are low.
PRAPARE social determinants (stable housing, employment, insurance) contextualize whole-person care and therapy access for depression, though the findings are reassuring and non-actionable.
